title: AGNI Governance Policy
description: Policy for lesson compliance: UTU, teaching modes, difficulty bounds.

utuTargets.description: Target UTU coordinates for cohort coverage. Each target specifies a Spine + Band, optionally a Protocol.

protocol.description: Optional. Target protocol P1–P5 for this coordinate.

requireUtu.description: If true, lessons must have a UTU label.

requireTeachingMode.description: If true, lessons must declare teaching_mode.

allowedProtocols.description: Pedagogical protocols permitted (P1-P5). E.g. [1,2,3] for rigor.

failureModeHints.description: Include failure-mode hint when protocol check fails.

enforceUtuTargets.description: When true, theta excludes lessons whose UTU band does not match any utuTargets from scheduling. Override via catalog utuBandOverrides. Default: false (advisory only).
